title: SystemVerilog support pattern assignment to CONSTDTYPEs

features.name: assignment pattern initialization of const packed struct
features.description: Code should include a const declaration of a packed struct type initialized using SystemVerilog assignment pattern syntax
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [0:0] enable; logic [31:0] address; } struct_type;
const struct_type constant_name = '{enable: 1'h0, address: 32'h00000000};
